name: Overdue Job Work Orders
query:
SELECT
	jwo.name as "Job Work Order:Link/Job Work Order:180",
	jwo.contractor as "Contractor:Link/Contractor:150",
	jwo.source_item as "Source Item:Link/Item:150",
	jwo.qty_sent as "Qty Sent:Float:100",
	jwo.process as "Process::120",
	jwo.date_sent as "Date Sent:Date:100",
	jwo.expected_return_date as "Expected Return:Date:130",
	DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), jwo.expected_return_date) as "Days Overdue:Int:100",
	jwo.status as "Status::120"
FROM `tabJob Work Order` jwo
WHERE jwo.status NOT IN ('Received', 'Closed')
	AND jwo.expected_return_date < CURDATE()
ORDER BY jwo.expected_return_date ASC
